```
You have to – what are we in the business to do? We’re not in the business of generating the highest opt-in rate we can. We’re in the business of ROI. We’re investors. We’re investing in assets. I want my return on the investment in that asset to be what I need it to be. Period. And so, if I have a campaign that – let’s say I have a campaign that is breakeven, for example, $100 cost per acquisition, $100 average order value, I don’t care about the marketing performance metrics. I don’t care what the conversion rate is. I don’t care any – none of those things will change the fact that that campaign is viable and bringing us new buyers for free every day.

Jaime:	So, how often do you tweak? So, let’s say for example you do have that. It’s an ATM machine. You put in $1, you get out $2. Do you even bother with tweaking anything on the conversion? You just back away slowly?

Todd:	Yeah. I don’t wanna touch it.

Jaime:	Put more money –

Todd:	Listen, I tell my team, when we’ve got something that’s working extraordinarily well, I’m like, “Listen, don’t change it, don’t even log into the thing. Don’t do anything. Don’t do anything. Don’t even look at it.” Why? When it is within our KPI, our key performance indicator, and let’s say for us that is breakeven.

And look, in the spirit of transparency, we have a lot of campaigns we’re willing to go negative. So, we’re willing to go out of pocket somewhere between $20 and $30 for every buyer that we get. But let’s say we have campaign that’s somewhere between that and breakeven, so it’s within KPI. Done. Done. We’re not in the business of endlessly toying with these campaigns. We’re in the business of getting them within the KPI because of the ROI that we want.

Jaime:	What about longevity of them, though? Because eventually after a while you kinda do have to tweak it, right?

Todd:	Correct. So, when it drops out of KPI, that’s when we’ll go in there and tweak it.

Jaime:	Yeah. Not rocket science, people.

Todd:	And sometimes I will. In the spirit of transparency, sometimes there are campaigns that when they drop out of KPI, they could drop out of KPI for a variety of reasons. Sometimes the idea behind the campaign is just no longer a fresh, interesting, new idea. It’s been knocked off. Like our competitors came along and copied it and now it’s old news to the marketplace. That requires a much bigger tweak than another issue, let’s say. Sometimes you gotta scrap the campaign after six months or seven months or whatever it may be. But I think, I wouldn’t even, for the majority of folks, I wouldn’t even worry about that.

Jaime:	They haven’t even gotten there yet. Yeah.

Todd:	They get their first campaign rocking and rolling and their whole life is gonna change because they’re finally gonna see – like I saw many, many moons ago, if you can generate one new sale you can generate ten, and you can generate ten you can generate 100, and you can generate 100 the sky’s the limit to what it is that you can do. And the opportunity is there. So, focus on the first step and don’t worry about that bridge. We’ll cross it when we come to it.

Jaime:	Well, I appreciate that we’re not selling them, “And then you get 100 sales right away!” You know what I mean? You said on one of your website videos, it just takes some hard work. But it’s not rocket science and as long as you keep moving forward, and don’t screw things up too, too much, you can at least make a lot more progress than you are now not doing anything.

Todd:	Yeah. I mean, look, I always say to folks, “Look, if there was a magic button, I wouldn’t be here right now. I’d be pushing the magic button.”

Jaime:	Cha-ching. Cha-ching. Yeah.

Todd:	Right? And I wish there was. I’m like everybody else. I wish there was. Look, you’ve gotta recognize without going off on this crazy tangent that a single good properly designed, like we’ve talked about today, marketing campaign can truly change your life. But I always say, “It only takes one . . .” The whole “one funnel away.” Like my buddy, one funnel. I do believe that people are only one funnel away. That’s not to say that it’s your next funnel, and that’s not to say that it’s not gonna take iterations and optimization and work. It is. It is. That’s the nature of the beast.

But if you’re willing to do that, my gosh. We’re talking about your life here. And so when people ask me, “How do you – any advice to get motivated?” I’m like, “No.” Because you’re either motivated by the outcome or you’re not. If you’re not jacked up and excited about the idea of having your own business where sales are coming in every single day like clockwork and you’re changing lives and impacting people, there ain’t nothing that I can say to you that’s gonna change that.

Jaime:	Preach. All right. So, I know we have to start wrapping up because, oh my goodness, I could talk to you all day. And of course, we already said we’re gonna have you back on so there’s that, too. We’re gonna do a part two. But for the last question, what is one action listeners can take this week to help move them forward towards their goal of a million?

Todd:	I’m gonna go back to – I’m gonna cheat and I’m gonna go back to, I’m gonna say, please, please, please take that time, set aside time, put forty minutes on your calendar at some point over the next week to sit down with that pad and pen and I want you to interrogate your method, your approach, your system, your formula, your process, whatever you wanna call it, to identify your unique mechanism.

And then name it. Don’t overthink it. Don’t go promotional. Name it. And if you do that one step I think that you’ll have a little bit more fire in the belly to take that mechanism to the world. And so, if you could do that I would be so proud of each and every one of you.

Jaime:	Foundational things might be unsexy on the outset but they freaking make money. So, you should totally do it.

Todd:	Well said. Well said.

Jaime:	Thank you so much for coming on the show today, Todd. Tell us where we can find more about you.

Todd:	So, you could go to toddbrown, T-O-D-D-B-R-O-W-N.me. I believe that if they go to E5 bundle, so that’s the letter E, the numeral 5, bundle, B-U-N-D-L-E.com. I think the team has my book there with some other bonus goodies. I think folks just have to cover shipping or something like that, $10, $15, something like that. Well worth it if you wanna learn more about the E5 Method. And on social, Instagram, @toddbrown I think it is on Instagram. And that’s all.

Jaime:	I love it. And on Facebook there’s like a bazillion people tagging you on all the mentor. You’re amazing, blah, blah, blah. So, if anyone wants to read any of that stuff, even though customer testimonials aren’t worth anything.

Todd:	It’s all nonsense. It’s all crazy. It’s all nuts. It’s crazy. You know what? I’ll tell you – I’ll leave folks with this. I’m a regular dude from New Jersey who was a terrible student, total goofball. I’m so thankful that the only thing I can do fairly well is marketing because I can’t do anything else. And so, you just gotta keep putting one foot in front of the other. You can do this. There’s no question. You don’t need talent. You don’t need any special connections. You don’t need a whole bunch of money. I started with $800. You can do it. You just gotta keep going. Commit to it and you can make it happen.

Jaime:	Awesome. And thank goodness for the internet. Thanks so much, Todd. I hope you have an absolute amazing day.

Todd:	You too. Thank you so much for having me.
```

web.markdown:
[![The E5 Method for a Winning Acquisition Campaign – with Todd Brown](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/Todd-Brown.webp)](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/campaigns-with-todd-brown/ "The E5 Method for a Winning Acquisition Campaign – with Todd Brown")

# [The E5 Method for a Winning Acquisition Campaign – with Todd Brown](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/campaigns-with-todd-brown/\# "The E5 Method for a Winning Acquisition Campaign – with Todd Brown")

![](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/wp-content/uploads/2023/01/Todd-Brown.webp)

The E5 Method for a Winning Acquisition Campaign – with Todd Brown

The E5 Method for a Winning Acquisition Campaign – with Todd Brown

Rewind 10sPausePlayForward 10s

% buffered00:00

00:00

UnmuteMute

Settings

Play

[DOWNLOAD THE WORKBOOK NOW](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/Todd-Brown-Workbook-1.pdf)

Running a business today means facing one challenge above all others: acquiring customers profitably. Many entrepreneurs spend heavily on ads that fail to deliver. Others wrestle with offers that don’t connect or chase tactic after tactic with little payoff. The result is wasted time, lost energy, and disappointing returns. What changes everything is building an acquisition campaign that consistently turns prospects desire into action. The key is creating profitable customer acquisition campaigns that produce steady and predictable sales instead of short-lived wins.

In this episode of The Best Business Podcast, Daryl Urbanski speaks with Todd Brown, a leading authority in direct response marketing. He is one of the most sought-after marketing experts in the world. He is known for the E5 Method and for shaping seven-figure marketing campaigns for some of the biggest direct response marketers and companies online today. With over two decades of experience, Todd blends lessons from legacy direct response publishing and modern tactics. Thus, he gives rare insight into how to build marketing campaigns that ultimately determine growth and scale. Marketers today chasing all those things from lead generation tricks to exaggerated claims that fade quickly. The real challenge is mastering the customer acquisition process in a way that brings true scale.

Learn how to predictably acquire new customers and new buyers while thinking like an investor. Todd shares valuable lessons on shaping a big marketing idea and crafting a marketing message. He also shows how to build marketing funnels that effectively differentiate you in niche markets and niches online. With a focus on unique selling proposition and unique mechanism, he explains how to reach the right audience with the right incentive. This approach drives daily sales, new clients, and more money. The important point is clear: use proven methods to bring predictability into your own marketing campaigns. Doing so turns uncertainty into a reliable engine for growth.

## **Ancient Secrets Of Lead Generation**

This eBook has all the steps you would need to launch your business and help you to Generate Leads

I agree to receive SMS updates, alerts, and event reminders from BestBusinessCoach.ca & Add-On Agency. Message frequency may vary. Standard message and data rates may apply. Text HELP for support. Reply STOP at any time to unsubscribe.

[Get Started Now >>](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/campaigns-with-todd-brown/#)

[Privacy Policy](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/privacy-policy/) \| [Terms](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/terms-conditions/)

### **Here are three reasons why you should listen to the full episode:**

- Learn how the E5 Method can help you consistently generate new buyers from cold traffic, just as it has for Todd Brown’s consulting clients and coaching students.
- Understand the psychology and economics behind the customer acquisition process in direct response marketing campaigns. See why intense buying demand is the foundation of long-term profitability in your own business.
- Gain clarity on the most common mistakes marketers today make in their own marketing campaigns. Discover how Todd Brown helps avoid them by focusing on what drives making money and lasting results.

### **Resources**

- Todd Brown: [Website](https://toddbrown.me/) \| [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/toddbrowninc/) \| [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/toddbrown) \| [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWlIIwel956xVecFuBC80BA)
- [E5 Method Book](https://pages.toddbrown.me/e5book-details-c?gc_id=12032087724&gclid=Cj0KCQiA7bucBhCeARIsAIOwr-9ZbP2e4rfHKrpVd9-qgekrFzCFHHxsMjNKen7TzS3XQ2TL_MFx9yUaAjcOEALw_wcB&h_ad_id=490618264950&utm_campaign=%E2%80%9CCampaignName%E2%80%9D&utm_content=%E2%80%9CAdName%E2%80%9D&utm_medium=PPC&utm_source=YouTube) by Todd Brown
- [Best Business Podcast with Daryl Urbanski](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/podcasts-homepage/) \- Where you can find more insightful interviews like this one.

### **Episode Highlights**

### A Story That Sparked a Marketing Revolution

- Profitable marketing has high stakes, and every business either lives or dies based on its ability to acquire customers effectively.
- Todd Brown is reintroduced as one of the top minds in direct response marketing, responsible for shaping campaigns for industry giants, including big companies like Agora.
- Todd shares how a direct mail postcard turned his career trajectory. A fitness professional at the time, he was captivated by the idea of salesmanship in print and its scalability.
- This moment laid the foundation for what would become Todd’s lifelong mission.
- Reverse-engineering is what really works in marketing, Todd learned, and packaging it into replicable methods like the E5 Method.

![Free Personalized 20256 Content Marketing Plan](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/Banner-for-the-site-New-2026-Content-Marketing-Plan.webp)

### Get Your Free Personalized 2026 Content Marketing Plan

[Get It Now !](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/campaigns-with-todd-brown/#)

### Bridging the Gap Between Online Marketing and Direct Response Publishing

- Todd explains that his marketing method, taught through the E5, was born from time spent in two different worlds. Thus, it gives him a unique lens to spot the best practices in both.

- The E5 is a structured way to create customer-generating campaigns from paid traffic consistently and predictably.
- By taking full-fledged sales presentations and turning them into high-leverage assets, entrepreneurs can build marketing funnels that scale their reach and results.
- Todd stresses that while platforms and tactics shift, disruptive technologies don’t change the fundamentals of persuasion, psychology, and communication.

### The Timeless Secret: Why People Really Buy

- Todd highlights that most people mistake tactics for strategy. While VSLs, webinars, and funnels come and go, the human reasons for buying rarely change.
- Buyers don’t simply want a product. Instead, they want a unique benefit: faster results, ease of use, or a lower risk way of achieving something.
- Today's prospects are more skeptical and jaded, meaning a message must genuinely stand out by offering a differentiated mechanism or value proposition.
- Marketers must show proof and present “sin offers” (Superior, Irresistible, and No-brainer) to make conversion frictionless and generate steady results.

### Marketing Engineering: Inside the E5 Method Framework

The same marketing method unfolds through five key stages:

- **Examine**: Conduct detailed research into your market’s pain points, dreams, and competing offers.
- **Engineer**: Build out your messaging, identify your unique mechanism, and craft your sin offer.
- **Evaluate**: Launch your Minimum Viable Funnel (MVF) and look for baseline success metrics.
- **Enhance**: Optimize and build the full campaign after a positive test run.
- **Expand**: Scale up through media buying and traffic growth.

Todd emphasizes that marketers often skip or rush the offer-creation stage.

In contrast, E5 puts offer development before copywriting. It offers to drive the message, not the other way around.

The methodology is a diagnostic and scalable system that can be applied across different niches and funnel types.

### Moving from Transactional Thinking to Investor Thinking

- Todd shares that the success of marketing campaigns ultimately determines whether a business grows or stalls.
- Instead of aiming to profit on the first sale, focus on the value of the customer over time.
- See how much they’ll buy at 30, 60, or 90 days, or even across an entire year.
- Like Netflix invests in subscribers who pay more over time, businesses should prioritize long-term Customer Lifetime Value (CLV) over front-end profits.
- “He who can afford to pay the most to acquire a customer wins,” Todd says. This higher CAC tolerance opens the door to more reach and growing, exciting businesses.

## Stop Barely Getting By. Build a Business That Can Survive & Thrive  Through Anything.

[![👉](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f449.svg) Get My Free Ticket](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/campaigns-with-todd-brown/)

Free to attend • No hype • Real strategies from proven experts

## Secure Your Free Ticket to the   Survive & Thrive Summit

Enter your details below so we can reserve your seat, send your access links, and event reminders.

[![🥇](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/1f947.svg) Confirm My Free Ticket](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/campaigns-with-todd-brown/#)

### Common Pitfalls and Misunderstood Metrics in Marketing

- Todd warns against using surface-level metrics like open rates, click-throughs or conversion percentages to make decisions.
- True performance should be measured in cost per acquisition vs. customer value—the rest are diagnostic tools.
- Many entrepreneurs are plagued by “shiny object syndrome,” hopping from webinar to challenge to funnel without mastery.
- Todd encourages each business to choose one model and repeat it—because mastery and all this focus bring predictable generating daily sales.

### Making Subscriptions Sell Themselves

- Selling subscription products, particularly information-based (e.g., newsletters), requires a different strategy. This is what Todd calls "premium-driven campaigns."
- Instead of selling content you haven’t created yet, sell the premium (bonus) that solves a current, urgent problem.
- For Netflix-style access subscriptions, the focus is on convenience, transformation, and long-term value. This is what marketers call dual brain communication of logic and emotion.
- The goal is to connect immediately with the buyer’s pain and present a unique mechanism that makes staying subscribed a no-brainer.

### Marketing for the Long Game: Final Thoughts

- Daryl and Todd remind listeners that businesses succeed when they understand they are playing an economic game, not just a creative.
- Treat marketing as an investment. Know your acquisition costs, front-end value, and post-purchase expansion plans.
- The goal is not just a better conversion rate; the goal is more customers, higher lifetime value, and building the path toward an eventual millionaire outcome.
- For more, check the full resources on the marketing campaign website, where A-list entrepreneurs and others share their case studies.

#### Todd Brown – Marketing Strategist & Founder of Marketing Funnel Automation

Todd Brown is a world-renowned marketing strategist, founder of [**Marketing Funnel Automation**](https://toddbrown.me/), and a leader in helping businesses craft high-converting marketing funnels. With over two decades of experience, Todd has helped hundreds of businesses develop marketing plans that drive growth, scale their efforts, and create marketing strategies that lead to consistent sales and increased customer engagement.

As the creator of the Marketing Funnel Automation system, Todd has developed a proven method for building automated marketing systems that not only increase marketing efforts but also align closely with a company's target market. By focusing on crafting compelling value propositions and aligning them with a customer’s needs, Todd's approach ensures that businesses connect with the right people, leading to more conversions and sustained growth.

Todd shares his expertise across multiple platforms, from social media channels to his popular YouTube channel, helping entrepreneurs and marketers refine their current marketing strategy and meet their marketing goals.

![📌](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/1f4cc.svg)**Expertise:** Marketing Strategy · Funnel Building · Value Proposition Development · Customer Engagement · Marketing Automation

![🔗](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/16.0.1/svg/1f517.svg)**Connect:** [Website](https://toddbrown.me/) \| [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/toddbrowninc/) \| [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/toddbrown) \| [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCWlIIwel956xVecFuBC80BA)

* * *

#### Daryl Urbanski – Business Growth Strategist & High-Performance Coach

Daryl Urbanski is a business strategist, entrepreneur, and host of [the Best Business Podcast](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/podcasts-homepage/), known for [helping businesses scale 7-figure revenue streams](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/case-studies-add-on-agency/) using evidence-based marketing, automation, and sales optimization. With [$50,000+ in research](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/success-factors/) and 400+ expert interviews, he identified [The 8 Critical Business Habits driving business success](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/success-on-how-to-run-a-business/).

As the founder of BestBusinessCoach.ca, [Daryl helps entrepreneurs master lead generation, high-performance habits, and automated sales systems](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/wp-content/uploads/2025/03/Media-Kit-Daryl-Urbanski-Updated-Final-2025.pdf)—turning struggling businesses into profitable, scalable enterprises. [His work has generated millions in revenue](https://youtu.be/-j7iQS0JLRo?) and has been featured on top industry platforms.

![📍](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/15.1.0/svg/1f4cd.svg) Expertise: Business Growth, Sales, Marketing Automation, Leadership

![🔥](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/15.1.0/svg/1f525.svg) Work With Us: [Add On Agency](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/case-studies-add-on-agency/) \| [Business Coaching](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/case-studies-habit-hero/) \| [Contact Us](https://members.bestbusinesscoach.ca/contact-us/)

![🎤](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/15.1.0/svg/1f3a4.svg) Podcast:  [Spotify](https://open.spotify.com/show/7jUgzYkW5Tr0zkAgsmiOx0?si=iCfnJ6b5TgKw8XOaeX39Hw&nd=1&dlsi=45ae8467135f4ade) \| [Apple Podcasts](https://podcasts.apple.com/us/podcast/the-best-business-podcast-with-daryl-urbanski/id953821164) \| [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/c/DarylUrbanski)

![👥](https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/15.1.0/svg/1f465.svg) Social: [Linkedin](https://www.linkedin.com/in/darylurbanski/) \| [Face Book](https://www.facebook.com/TheRealDarylUrbanski/) \| [X](https://x.com/DarylUrbanski/) \| [TikTok](https://www.tiktok.com/@skillsforsuccess) \| [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/skillsforsuccess/)

Masterclass to help entrepreneurs and small business owners acquire more customers. Not to mention it's converting EXTREMELY well for affiliate partners. ![](https://www.mattmcwilliams.com/wp-content/uploads/2014/05/images/11744bd7b6fb849240e196d7d1b1da8a5d737151f5ec88e4bd335a40208d06d5.jpg)

# Three Reasons I Am Excited About Todd's Launch

There are several reasons I'm very excited about this launch personally. Here are three:

# 1\. Great Conversions

The best part about promoting a course on customer acquisitions and sales conversions is, well, you know it’s going to convert! And this launch flat out converts!

# 2\. Amazing Product

Todd's approach to marketing, sales funnels and conversions is revolutionary and exciting. Your audience will learn the ins and outs of the E5 method and will not be disappointed in the results they'll experience from implementing it into their business.

# 3\. Todd Brown

Todd is one of the most respected voices today when it comes to sales funnels and marketing in general. When Todd talks about marketing, I make sure to listen. You and your audience will LOVE him!

# About the Masterclass

First off, you might be asking yourself, "what does C.A.M.P. stand for?".

Great question. C.A.M.P. stands for Customer Acquisition Marketing Protocol.

Todd Brown's E5 method is a new and very different marketing approach that produces doubledigit sales conversions.

It will show your audience how to consistently generate new customers from just ONE evergreen marketing campaign Create a surge of new buyers with any product, in any market, at any price point. Help your audience turn their prospect’s desire for a result into an intense buying desire for their product WITHOUT resorting to sleazy, scammy or “hypey” selling. Finally, it will help them stand out in the most crowded marketplace and never have their marketing ignored again!

\[callout\]RECOMMENDED PROGRAMS: Learn about more great programs like Todd's here.\[/callout\]

# Target Audience

The ideal prospect for the E5 C.A.M.P. Masterclass is a small business owner or entrepreneur looking to acquire new customers.

Whether they are a speaker, author, physical product owner, info-product marketer, or a service provider, E5 C.A.M.P. and the E5 Method will help them immensely.

# What's Inside the Masterclass?

The E5 C.A.M.P. Masterclass is a truly one-of-a-kind course with an MBA level training in customer acquisition. Ed Dale, legendary marketer and founder of “The Challenge” describes it as “the most comprehensive marketing training he’s seen in over a decade online”.

Scroll down further to see more great reviews of Todd's masterclass from successful marketers, as well as students who have gone through the program.

![](https://www.mattmcwilliams.com/wp-content/uploads/2014/05/images/271ae79ba97dacd754945ae47f4a49657a72fa68af9be61e8f593685ee2dde8c.jpg)

E5 C.A.M.P. Masterclass is 8 comprehensive modules, composed of 30 complete video lessons and accompanying worksheets.

Todd is also throwing in exclusive launch bonuses as well as key live coaching and feedback elements to deliver a truly unique and over the top experience.

Your audience is going to LOVE it!

\[button href $\\fallingdotseq$ " [http://www.mattmcwilliams.com/e5campaffiliatesignup](http://www.mattmcwilliams.com/e5campaffiliatesignup)" primary $=$ "true" centered $\\underline { { \\underline { { \\mathbf { \\Pi } } } } }$ "true" newwindow $=$ "true"\]SIGN-UP AS AN AFFILIATE FOR THE E5 C.A.M.P. MASTERCLASS\[/button\]

Here is the E5 C.A.M.P. Masterclass Welcome video, so you can get an idea of the type of content your audience will receive:

# VIDEO

# About Todd Brown

Regularly referred to as, "The go-to guy for creating wildly profitable marketing funnels" and "the marketing funnel expert other marketing funnel experts go to when they need help with their own funnels", Todd Brown has an uncanny knack for being able to rapidly transform ordinary, mundane marketing campaigns into grand-slam money-makers.

With over a dozen years of in-the-trenches direct response marketing experience, Todd's unique marketing funnel strategies, tactics, and copy hacks have generated tens of millions of dollars for himself, his coaching students, and his many clients.

![](https://www.mattmcwilliams.com/wp-content/uploads/2014/05/images/8614b575060205521d8d98102d3d659898ea04d30b38acf33cd2e371b736b769.jpg)

His extraordinary list of well-known clients -- many of which are some of the most respected marketers, copywriters, and entrepreneurs in the online marketing community today -- consists of individuals and companies in several dozen different markets and niches... from over 23 different countries around the globe.

Todd has also been part of multiple marketing projects with business luminaries such as: Rich Schefren, Jay Abraham, Clayton Makepeace, John Carlton, and many other legends of the direct response world. And that's why Todd is consistently able to produce such extreme and radical results for his clients -- and FAST!

\[callout\]Want to feature your launch like Todd? Click here to submit your launch or affiliate program. \[/callout\]

# Pricing

The E5 C.A.M.P. Masterclass will be $$ 1,997$ .

There will also be a 5-flex pay option at $$ 497$ .

# Commissions

Affiliates will earn $40 %$ commissions on all purchases.

$70 %$ of commissions will be paid out within 7 days of being earned, then on 30-day cycles for the remaining amounts.

# Prizes

Last year Todd offered over $$ 120,000$ in cash and prizes...this year will be more of the same!

# Fun Stats

We all love to geek out on stats (at least I do...), and Todd has some pretty fun stats to geek out on!

In Todd's last launch the average EPC was $$ 7.85$ .

We’re joined by Todd Brown in this episode of the LMScast podcast where he shares some expert strategies for growing your online course and membership website via marketing methods based on great ideas. Todd created a philosophy called the E5 Method, and he shares how you can use that to optimize your marketing and get on the right track for your online education website.

A marketing campaign's big idea is the message that underlies all elements of a campaign to resonate with the audience you’re going after. It is something that resonates with your audience and is the source or reference for the methods and messaging of your marketing campaign.

Every marketing campaign, promotion, and marketing message has an idea behind it. The copy, the words, the phrases, the message, and the headline of those marketing messages are just expressing the idea. But behind every message is the big idea. What ultimately determines the success of a marketing campaign is rooted in the people in your audience resonating with your idea or message emotionally.

# The Marketing Funnel – Understanding Market Sophistication

[Engineering Your Funnel](https://toddbrown.me/category/engineering/)

To create a wildly-profitable marketing funnel, you must… MUST… start by understanding your market’s level of sophistication. It starts by assessing what they’ve seen before in the way of advertisements, marketing, and offers.

This video demonstrates how to assess your market’s level of sophistication.

We’re joined by Todd Brown in this episode of the LMScast podcast where he shares some expert strategies for growing your online course and membership website via marketing methods based on great ideas. Todd created a philosophy called the E5 Method, and he shares how you can use that to optimize your marketing and get on the right track for your online education website.

A marketing campaign's big idea is the message that underlies all elements of a campaign to resonate with the audience you’re going after. It is something that resonates with your audience and is the source or reference for the methods and messaging of your marketing campaign.

Every marketing campaign, promotion, and marketing message has an idea behind it. The copy, the words, the phrases, the message, and the headline of those marketing messages are just expressing the idea. But behind every message is the big idea. What ultimately determines the success of a marketing campaign is rooted in the people in your audience resonating with your idea or message emotionally.

You can learn more about Todd Brown and the E5 Method at E5Bundle.com. His best stuff is in there. The E5 bundle has a bunch of stuff that you can go through that will give you a really solid understanding of what Todd and Chris talked about in this episode, but is much more in depth in his book. Thanks for joining us!

ABOUT LifterLMS
=====================

We help education entrepreneurs to help their learners achieve desired outcomes, to truly change lives, and make a great living in the process.

We help them by creating the software, strategies, community, and training to grow high value online courses or training based membership websites from nothing.

The change we want to make is to democratize learning in the digital classroom, to put power in the hands of education entrepreneurs, and help as many people as we can to reach their dreams.

We'll know we are successful when we are seen as the organization that can help any education entrepreneur that is on a mission to help their learners overcome problems, capture opportunity, and make a huge impact in their community.

We'll know we are successful when our education entrepreneurs consistently achieve financial, location, and creative freedom.

We'll know we are successful in the WordPress community when we are seen as the model for how to do freemium in WordPress.

We will create our legacy by changing lives for WordPress LMS site building professionals, our customers, thier learners, our families, our communities, and the world in every way we can.

![You are currently viewing Todd Brown – E5 Camp Masterclass 2025 (Group Buy)](https://econolearn.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/Todd-Brown-%E2%80%93-E5-Camp-Masterclass.png)

- Post published:December 6, 2025
- Post category: [Digital Marketing](https://econolearn.com/digital-marketing-courses/)/ [Group Buys](https://econolearn.com/group-buy-courses/)/ [Sales](https://econolearn.com/sales/)

> E5 CAMP Masterclass by Todd Brown teaches you how to build full funnel campaigns that attract, engage, and convert prospects into customers without relying on hype or pushy [sales](https://econolearn.com/best-digital-marketing-courses-in-2026/) tactics. The course walks you through analyzing your market and audience, engineering a powerful marketing message, and crafting a funnel (from lead capture to offer conversion) designed to tap into what prospects really want. You also learn how to test, optimize, and scale funnels so leads and sales become predictable, not sporadic. Ideal for coaches, product creators, or businesses wanting dependable client acquisition and sales flow.

about

# todd brown.

_Considered the #1 authority on engineering profitable customer acquisition campaigns…_

Todd Brown is the expert other experts go to when they need help with their own business.

With clients in over 33 different countries, operating in over 65 different mass and niche markets, it’s been said that Todd has helped his students engineer more six and seven-figure funnels than any other expert online today.

His list of coaching students, consulting clients, and subscribers reads like a Who’s Who of A-List Entrepreneurs.

His Agency has created the promotions behind some of the biggest direct response marketers and companies online today.

And, entrepreneurs fly-in to West Palm Beach, Florida — from all around the globe — for a single day of guidance with Todd to learn his renowned E5 Method.

# **“Want The 28-Page Full Color Top One™ Magazine Sent To Your Doorstep?”**

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/7f/894a70708146398f0bf03f1051b0b2/toddmag-cover3.png)

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/ab/d63e264bd84cec9b9ac761942daee8/toddmag-cover2.png)

[SEND ME MY COPY - FREE!](https://toponemastermind.com/top-one-details#submit-form)

![](https://app.clickfunnels.com/images/closemodal.png)

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/05/8a604747a9427b857b65192b938664/TopOne-Logo-Hor-Light.png)

**Private Mastermind With Todd Brown...**

**Are You Ready To Get In The Room With The Savviest Marketers In The Game Doing A Combined $400MM Using The Latest Direct Response Tactics & Strategies?**

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/d3/3ea991e2b411e88f01cb7b195f38ee/toddbrown-min.jpg)

From the Desk of Todd Brown

Lake Worth, FL

Dear fellow entrepreneur,

You're here because you're ready to grow and scale your business.

Through TOP ONE ™ I help business owners like you add an additional one million dollars per year to their business - at a minimum.

If that's something you want to do in the next 12 months...

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/d3/3ea991e2b411e88f01cb7b195f38ee/toddbrown-min.jpg)

From the Desk of Todd Brown

Lake Worth, FL

Then take the next few minutes to read this short letter to learn what TOP ONE™ is, what makes it different and how it can help grow and scale your business.

Over the years of successfully building and scaling businesses in every market and niche around, and helping countless others do the same, I have observed a simple and profound  truth…

The level of success we achieve in our businesses is not determined by how hard we work, how much startup capital we invest, or sadly even how great our product or service is (as much as we’d like to tell ourselves it does).

The fact is, **the amount of income we create for ourselves and our families and the lifestyle we enjoy is ultimately determined by the brilliance behind the marketing messages we create and the level of genius we use when executing on those strategies.**

I’ve seen so many great entrepreneurs with solid businesses hit a wall.

Maybe it happens at the $3M mark.

Or the $10M mark…

They get sucked into the daily grind of the business, and the marketing that got them to where they are is no longer as fresh, as sharp, or as compelling.

Their campaign ideas become contrived and weak.

Their marketplace gets more and more crowded.

And their offers just don’t convert.

Because of this, their sales and profits turn into an unpleasant roller coaster ride.

And what was once a thriving and enjoyable business to them, turns into drudgery.

But there is a better way...

You see, I have personally seen firsthand how so many entrepreneurs and their businesses are just one or two marketing clicks away from struggling to experiencing dramatic and lasting growth.

That’s why I started TOP ONE ™ .

Our students and clients needed a way to get direct access to me - to be able to leverage the unique marketing expertise and track record I have helping countless entrepreneurs scaling to 7, 8 and 9 figures.

And they wanted a way to get around the other savviest marketers in the game today, who are on the cutting edge of the most lucrative marketing strategies and systems working today.

To be able to leverage the collective marketing genius of this elite group I have assembled so they can make the most wildly profitable marketing and scaling decisions in their businesses.

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/78/a849b8f7ab41d9b09f2fb30f1bcd69/toddbrownmelogo.png)

# **What Is TOP ONE ™ ?**

## So let's talk about what TOP ONE ™ is, what makes it different and how it can help you grow your business.        TOP ONE ™ is a private mastermind with Todd Brown consisting of no more than 50 of the savviest direct response marketers in the world doing a combined 400MM dollars per year in revenue last we checked.          Considered the \#1 authority on engineering profitable customer acquisition campaigns…          Todd Brown is the expert other experts go to when they need help with their own business.          With clients in over 33 different countries, operating in over 65 different mass and niche markets, it’s been said that Todd has helped his students engineer more six and seven-figure funnels than any other expert online today.          His list of coaching students, consulting clients, and subscribers reads like a Who’s Who of A-List Entrepreneurs.          His Agency has created the promotions behind some of the biggest direct response marketers and companies online today.          And, entrepreneurs fly-in to West Palm Beach, Florida — from all around the globe — for a single day of guidance with Todd to learn his renowned E5 Method."

**Everything you need to know TOP ONE ™  is _NOT_...**

# **NO Mini-Conferences**

## It's a max of 50 of the smartest and most giving people you ever met.   No one pitching anything. Just sharing what's actually working for them with proof.

# **NO** **Egos**

## No posturing, no lambo-selfies. Zero egoes. We are all here to learn. And work. Period.

# **NO Motivation or Inspiration**

## Our TOP ONE ™  members never need to be amped up. They just want to share the best of what’s working today with other players so they can go BIGGER, FASTER!

# **NO Idea Overload**

## There is little value to giving you a giant list of ideas that has you feeling more overwhelmed than before you ever came into the room. Yes, we will lay out the best of the best of what is working right now. But we will not hold back telling you what you do and don’t need to be doing!

# **NO Whitewater Rafting**

## If you’re looking for an excuse to go shark diving, this ain’t it. You can hang glide on your own time with extra profits and freedom we help create for you. We’re here to work.

# **What Makes**  **TOP ONE ™ Different?**

# **You'll grow and scale using a proven marketing method based on whatever stage your business is in**

In many cases, when we work together I'll be leveraging my **proven E5 Method.**

This is the same marketing method thousands of business owners just like you are using to acquire new clients and customers consistently and predictably in over 45 different countries operating in over 65 different mass and niche markets.

E5 is a five stage method designed to engineer customer acquisition campaigns from scratch.

**We'll use E5 in all five stages to grow and scale your business.**

For example, if you still don’t have customer acquisition dialed in, I’ll work with you in the examination and engineering stages to help get clear on things like your primary promise, big marketing idea and unique mechanism.

If you’re struggling with understanding your data and what your next move(s) should be, I'll work with you in the evaluation stage so you stop wasting time focusing on the wrong things.

Instead I'll quickly identify constraints in your campaign so you can get it moving into the profit zone as fast as possible.

If you’re experiencing scaling challenges I’ll work with you in the enhancement and expansion stages to identify the needle movers and traffic approaches that will create drastic shifts in how well your campaigns perform.

Not only will you be using the most effective marketing method for getting new clients, customers and profits in your business....

But you'll have the creator of that method working with you side by side to ensure every single step is executed exactly as it should be, when it should be.

# **You'll Leverage My Unique Direct Response Marketing Experience To Uncover Hidden Opportunities In Your Business**

With over 20 years experience engineering profitable marketing campaigns in over 65 different markets, verticals and niches....

It’s safe to say there’s almost no challenge I haven't faced and overcame, no approach I haven't tested and validated and no strategy I haven't executed on when it comes to engineering, launching and scaling profitable marketing campaigns.

Through TOP ONE ™ you will leverage that wisdom and experience in your business so you’re never unsure of what you should be focusing on.

You’ll know exactly what works, what doesn’t and what you should be working on right now, 30 days from now and 90 days from now to grow your business.

Just as I've done for countless other business owners and marketers **I'll uncover opportunities in your business you never even knew existed.**

This is often the case with many business owners.

They come to me because they're stuck.

They've hit a wall somewhere in their business.

Maybe their campaigns aren't converting the way they used to.

Maybe they can't seem to figure out how to increase the life time value of each customer.

Maybe the traffic sources that were once "the holy grail of new customers" have suddenly dried up for them.

After sitting down with them face to face and diving into the business as if it was my own I'm often able to identify hidden profit opportunities they never even knew existed or thought about.

Sometimes these opportunities are staring them right in the face and all it takes is a few tweaks or minor changes to create massive impact in the business.

Other times I may have to dig a little deeper.

But almost all of the time I'm able remove these blind spots so the business can grow and scale.

And I have no doubt I can do the same for you and your business.

Fact is because you're not going to get this kind of attention in any other mastermind...

It's highly unlikely you'll ever identify these opportunities.

Which leads to the next reason why TOP ONE ™ is different.

# **You'll Get Direct Access To Me and My Team So We're In The Trenches Growing and Scaling Your Business Together**

Unlike other masterminds where there is no direct access to the host, you get a higher level of direct relationship, intimacy and guidance from me and my team.

Last time I checked no else offers this.

TOP ONE ™ is not a place for me to put myself on a pedestal and talk about how great I am.

It's an opportunity for me to do what I am most passionate about...

Working directly with business owners to grow and scale using "in the trenches" direct response marketing strategies.

Period.

I'll treat your business as if it was mine and work along side you every step of the way.

Here's what that looks like...

Anytime you're launching a new campaign I'll be right along side you in trenches guiding you as to which hooks, ideas, mechanisms and approaches I would use.

**In many cases I am rolling up my sleeves and actually editing campaigns and rewriting copy for you.**

Why?

Because I want to ensure very single aspect of your marketing is as dialed in as it can be so all your campaigns perform successfully - whatever that means for YOUR business.

That could be increasing conversions, lowering CPA's, lifting AOV or LTV or all of the above.

Think about how much more profitable and scalable your marketing campaigns would be if you had me as your "marketing partner" looking over every single piece of copy and messaging...

Tweaking, editing and repositioning aspects of the campaign that I know will drastically move the needle.

You’ll never be left wondering “What should I do next?” or “I wonder how Todd would approach this?” because I will give you the exact answers to those questions so there’s zero uncertainty.

**TOP ONE ™ is the only place where you get direct access to me.**

But aside from that TOP ONE ™ is the only place where you get access to my entire team including:

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/57/f16aea80194cbb9b32eecdaf4c59da/Group-13.png)

### My business partner and COO Damian Lanfranchi

Damian has invested over two decades successfully building his own and others online businesses from zero to multiple seven figures.

He is a rare breed who has excelled in every role of a business from founder, marketer, sales closer, integrator, operator and visionary.

His passion is to help others do the same so they can turn their passions into profitable businesses.

You can tap into Damian's business savvy to help you with things like:

Identifying the right roles and talent to build a team that can support as you scale your business.

Building out the right accountability charts and scorecards to get pique performance from your team.

Mastering financials so you can maximize bottomline profits as you grow your top line.

Leadership mindset and coaching - making tough and painful decisions as business grows and changes.

Leveraging the 80/20 rule - Guiding you on the few things you need to focus on that will change trajectory of your business rather than the many things that will not.

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/01/8fabaad900478f948ddef4bd445c70/Group-9.png)

### My Chief Tech Officer Teddy Garcia

Known as the “secret tech weapon” behind some of the biggest business and marketing superstars including Jay Abraham, Solly Hogshead, Danny Kennedy and Rich Schefren, Teddy knows more than just software.

He’s a bonafide direct response and online marketing expert too.

He has real world experience building hundreds of successful marketing campaigns for some of the biggest marketers in the world who were his private clients.

He knows how to structure compelling offers to maximize customer value. (And how to follow-up with buyers and non-buyers alike)…

**And he understands how to integrate it all into your tech strategy.**

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/6a/d1a83a61a84da298d84a2ec0e540b1/Group-1.png)

### My Director of Operations Chris Losey

Chris is a seasoned master of running all operational aspects of a rapidly scaling, and highly profitable, direct response based business.

He has created proprietary processes and systems for critical aspects of a growing business, including but not limited to: reducing refunds, recovering lost sales, product fulfillment, program creation & delivery, developing and retaining employees, managing expenses and more.

**And he can help you optimize in any and all of these areas.**

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/16/4fa221a3da4377a91b5b2a637acfc0/john_mulry_circle_2023.png)

### The E5 Agency Director John Mulry

John Mulry is an award-winning, Dan Kennedy-trained trusted marketing advisor with a unique, deep knowledge that spans copywriting, direct response strategy, media-buying, offer creation, and funnel optimization to name a few.

Author of eight business books, John ran his own successful copywriting and consultancy business before joining forces with Todd Brown to be his Director of the E5 Agency which helps multi-six-figure and seven-figure businesses achieve their media buying and traffic conversion goals.

**John can help you build and scale successful media campaigns along all advertising platforms.**

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/74/1f13b02775475887dc01a71c5c3140/Group-16.png)

### My Entire Coaching Staff

The E5 coaching staff has real world experience helping dozens of direct response marketers and business owners create E5 campaigns from scratch.

They're also well trained in offer creation and general direct response marketing best practices.

Any time you have questions about your campaign or need guidance and direction with your offers or marketing tactics they can work with you.

They'll even work with you in our E5 Acquisition Accelerator Coaching program if need be.

This is an 8 week done with you coaching program where each week the coach will cover a different component and topic from E5 then work with you to ensure you've executed each step in the process correctly.

By the time your 8 weeks together are done **you'll have a E5 campaign fully built out and ready to acquire new clients and customers.**

# **Unique Benefits of TOP ONE ™ Membership**

## Now let's talk about the unique benefits of  TOP ONE ™ and how it can help **grow and scale YOUR business.**

# **CONSULTING**

# **TOP ONE PLANNING CALL TO ENSURE YOU KNOW THE EXACT  STEPS YOU NEED TO TAKE**

With your TOP ONE ™ Planning Session, you’ll know exactly what to do, every 90 days, to see your business grow bigger and faster. During your private, one-on-one quarterly planning sessions with Todd, you’ll layout the exact marketing steps to drive more sales, more new customers, and more profits... every 90 days.

# **ADVISORY BOARD CALLS SO YOU GET THE HELP YOU NEED WHEN YOU NEED IT**

Ever find yourself facing a critical business decision or even a crisis and not sure who you can call? Now have the peace of mind knowing that when you need it most, you are not alone. Get on a private call with Todd

(or even his C.O.O. or C.T.O. if you ask) and work through yourchallenge with Todd as your partner.

# **CAMPAIGNS**

# **E5 ACQUISITION CAMPAIGN INSTALLED IN YOUR BUSINESS**

Despite having seven figure plus businesses, many entrepreneurs still struggle with customer acquisition. My coaching team will work with you over 8 weeks through our E5 Acquisition Accelerator Program to build out your very own E5 campaign so you can acquire new clients, customers and sales consistently and predictably.

# **COPY REVIEWS SO EVERY SINGLE ASPECT OF EVERY CAMPAIGN IS DIALED IN AND READY TO PERFORM**

Whether you are launching your next big-money campaign or you have

an existing campaign you want to dramatically increase conversions and

sales on, Todd will personally critique your campaign and tell you exactly

what he would do if he was your partner.

# **PRIVATE WORKSHOPS SO YOU'RE ON TOP OF THE LATEST MARKETING STRATEGIES**

Six private full-day workshops with Todd, where you will learn the latest most advanced marketing strategies. Learning with the goal of implementation is at the heart of these workshops. These events will be something that you will not want to miss.

# **MY ENTIRE LIBRARY AT YOUR FINGERTIPS SO YOU ALWAYS HAVE RESOURCES**

As a Top OneTM member, you will get access to Todd’s FULL library of courses… with hundreds of hours of training, covering everything from Copy to Media Buying. So whether you need to brush up on some of your Foundational Marketing Skills, or you need training for a right now issue, his library will be at your finger tips.

# **CONNECTIONS**

# **MASTERMIND EXPERIENCE**

Join the entire Top One™ family for three, 3-day Top One Experiences in Orlando,

at the Top One™ mansion . These intense sessions are purposely designed

to be high-impact. Meaning, just ONE of them can add over one million

dollars or more to your business over the course of the year. These are

perfect for the busy entrepreneur who wants to stop working so hard

and start enjoying their business once again.

# **POWER CONNECTIONS**

Every month you will have an opportunity to meet as a group with your fellow Top One™ members. This gives you an opportunity to add and receive value by connecting and building dynamic relationships within

this Elite Group of Entrepreneurs.

# **COMMUNITY**

Build profitable partnerships and lucrative joint ventures with the savviest direct response entrepreneurs online today. You’ll be surrounded by 7 & 8 figure business owners who will shortcut your path to doubling and even tripling your revenue by showing you the exact strategies currently working for them.

# **Who's In**  **TOP ONE ™ ?**

How Fast Can Your Business Grow After Joining Us?

## When I first began Top One, the room was filled with mostly 6 and 7 figure businesses.         By the second year it was almost all 7-figure businesses.           The year after it kept growing.           Now the room is made up of multiple 7 and multiple 8 figure businesses, and now includes our first 9-figure business.          Many of our Top One seats are occupied by the owner-entrepreneurs.           Some of our larger businesses have their DM or CMO in their Top One seat.          We have direct-response driven businesses from every niche and market and from as near as South Florida and as far as Hong Kong and Australia.

# **Are You One Of**  **"The Savviest Marketers In the GAME"?**

Nearly five years ago, Damian (my childhood best friend and business partner) and I had one of our infamous “get real conversations”.

You see it was in the wake of me enduring two fluke heart scares (sidenote: I’m 100% solid now, actually the healthiest I’ve ever been), that Damian got real with me…

“Todd, you have to be realistic. As the business grows, as our influence grows, you can’t work directly with all our students any longer. Sure we can still help everyone through our programs and courses. But when it comes to you personally putting your hands on their businesses and marketing, you can only do this for a select handful of individuals.”

I was hesitant. But I knew Damian was right.

We began thinking about who are the right people for me to work directly with.

This was the fun part. And we quickly agreed on 3 simple criterion...

# **Number 1:**  **Entrepreneurs who are already doing at least a million bucks or so.**

## Because if my team and I are going to work directly with you, I know if you have this foundation it will be fast and fun for us to add a million or more to your biz.        Because you already have a solid grasp on the essentials: you have a solid FE / BE strategy, you know your numbers (CPA, AOV, ROAS, LTV, etc.), you have a solid lead and customer list – with the advanced marketing and scaling strategies I like to deploy we can move the needle quickly.

# **Number 2:**  **We only consider people we believe everyone will enjoy being around.**

## This may sound a little “squishy”. Listen, Damian and I are both fathers of daughters (he has 3 little girls, I have 2 older ones).          So if we are going to leave our favorite loved ones behind to get down in the trenches, it needs to be to work hard for good people, the right people. Especially because the intimate way I run Top One.            Our members always tell us they are shocked at how deeply and personally involved I am with all of our Top One members - because they are used to the model where the “guru” just greets people and takes a picture with the group. No way. That’s not how I roll. And so since we are going to be spending so much time together and building a real relationship, I need to believe in you and your business.            This means you’re humble enough to admit you don’t know everything. You’re willing to learn and take correction. And in this dicey world of internet marketing, you have the integrity to always try your best to do the right thing.

# **Number 3:**  **You Must Be a Massive Action Taker!**

## And then the third thing Damian and I both agreed is a necessary quality for anyone we’re going to consider is they must be a massive action taker.        In Top One, there is no motivational hoorah, no mindset stuff. We are there to get down and dirty to aggressively scale your business through superior marketing, period.          Our Top One folks don’t need to be pushed or held accountable.          I remember at one of our earliest meetings, Damian was mapping out a back-end strategy for one of our members from the UK named Carl.           Damian is dropping bombs and Carl is just typing away on his computer.           Suddenly, Damian slams on the brakes.          “Carl! Stop fidgeting on your computer and listen up!!”          Carl stops. Stares at Damian -          “I’m telling my team to implement everything you said right now.”          That’s Top One.            That’s how we roll.            And that’s why we’re able to generate such massive growth for the folks we work with.

# **Think You're Ready To Join TOP ONE ™?**

## Now that you understand what TOP ONE ™ is, what makes it different and most importantly how it can help **add an additional $1,000,000 or more to your business....**          I have just one question...          Do you feel you're ready to join the savviest marketers in the game?          Click the button below and let's find out if you're a good fit.

**WHAT THE BIGGEST ONLINE MARKETERS ARE SAYING ABOUT TODD BROWN**

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/55/561d4d7bea467a8adc32166be6155e/JeffWalker.png)

“If you really want to move the needle, you HAVE to focus on your ‘Big Idea’ first. It’s the thing that makes the rest of your marketing easy. That’s why you should jump on board Todd’s marketing methods.”

**Jeff Walker \| Creator, Product Launch Formula**

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/5e/c5db0d2a92429a916ea63c4891622c/RichS.png)

“There are just two things that I think really speak highly of Todd. One is that he ran our marketing for several years (at Strategic Profits). I wouldn’t hire anyone that I didn’t think was the best!

Then, there are really only 3 people who I go to for advice on a consistent basis. One is Jay Abraham, one is Mark Ford (aka Michael Masterson), and then the other one is Todd Brown.

This is the guy that when I have to work on a report or when I have to figure out some kind of marketing thing that I’m trying to get my head around, Todd is the guy. If you know me, you know that I don’t really say that about very many people because that wouldn’t be true. But Todd really is the guy! To get Todd to help you get your campaign up and running, which is really the guts of your whole business, is one of the smartest things I think you can do!”

**Rich Schefren \| Strategic Profits**

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/ba/e1d3f1ecd6418bb923b32cbdb2320d/kevinr.png)

“I’ve been doing this almost 12 years and I am implementing (as Todd teaches)... that’s how powerful this is.”

**Kevin Rogers \| Founder, Copy Chief**

![](https://toponemastermind.com/hosted/images/19/cc753ab06f44589525d31a0eca9a17/JoeS.png)

“I’m absolutely convinced that had Todd and I not sat next to each other at one fateful dinner a couple years ago, I wouldn’t be in the same position that I’m at in my career or our business wouldn’t be at the same position that we’re at.”

**Joe Schriefer \| Agora Financial**

Speak Directly With Our C.O.O. & My Business Partner To See If You And Your Business Are Ready...

# Todd Brown – E5 Method 2025

[🔍](https://successcourses-shop.com/wp/product/todd-brown-e5-method-2025/#)

[![Todd Brown – E5 Method 2025](https://successcourses-shop.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/1000041980-600x600.png)](https://successcourses-shop.com/wp/wp-content/uploads/2025/12/1000041980.png)

## Todd Brown – E5 Method 2025

$22,00

Todd Brown – E5 Method 2025 quantity

Add to cart

Pay with

0000

Category: [Business](https://successcourses-shop.com/wp/product-category/business/)

- [Description](https://successcourses-shop.com/wp/product/todd-brown-e5-method-2025/#tab-description)
- [F.A.Q.](https://successcourses-shop.com/wp/product/todd-brown-e5-method-2025/#tab-desc_tab)

Here’s What You Get:

The BRAND NEW E5 CAMP™ Masterclass — over 15 hours of step-by-step coaching on the E5 Customer Acquisition Marketing Protocol™.

The Ultimate 6 Funnels Template Set — so can hit the ground running by simply modeling profitable campaigns I personally engineered.

BONUS #1: The Ultimate Director’s Cut Funnel Package — so you can see exactly how and why I say, do, show, and present everything in 4 of my personal multi-million-dollar producing marketing campaigns. And, get every piece of each to model for your own stuff.

BONUS #2: The Ultimate 15 Email Sequences Swipe File — so you’re fully stocked with models of all the email sequences you’ll ever need or want.

BONUS #3: The PRIVATE Facebook Scaling Training — so you can scale your Facebook traffic up to thousands of visitors a month… starting with just a $30 budget… using the exact method we do here at MFA.

Stage #1

EXAMINING

During the first stage, the examination stage, you’ll discover who your best prospects are.

What their primary buying triggers and desires are. And the perfect marketing promise for your E5 Campaign™.

You’ll identify the perfect campaign model to use for your market and product.

And you’ll learn how to pinpoint exactly what your prospects need to believe about your product in order to buy.

And by the end of this stage, you’ll know exactly how to present your product or service to your market.

So it stands out and is viewed as unique, different, and the perfect solution for your prospects.

And if you don’t have a product yet during this stage, you’ll learn how to identify and put together the perfect customer-attracting product to start with.

Stage #2

ENGINEERING

Now in the second stage, the engineering stage is where your new E5 Campaign™ gets set up.

You’ll learn how to put together a simple education-based message with what’s called your marketing argument.

You’ll learn how to get attention for your marketing.

Even if you’re in a crowded and competitive marketplace with what’s called your big marketing idea.

You’ll learn exactly what to say and how to say it in your marketing message. From opening to offer using what’s called a unique mechanism, which creates demand for your specific product or service.

You’ll learn how to use what are called C.P.B chunks.

So your marketing message not only makes the sale for you, but it also delivers value, creates goodwill, and has prospects view you as an authority.

And finally, you’ll learn how to construct your SIN Offer. A high conversion offer, which turns prospects into buyers without the need for high-pressure selling.

Stage #3

EVALUATING

Now in the third stage, the evaluation stage. You’ll learn how to launch your new E5 campaign to the marketplace to start generating sales right away with what’s called a minimum viable funnel.

A simple and fast way of rolling out your new marketing campaign with zero risk.

So you never waste time or money.

And you’ll learn how to collect and understand some simple marketing metrics, simple numbers.

So, you know, with certainty, how profitable your new campaign is when it’s time to begin scaling your traffic for more customers and when it’s time to make simple tweaks.

This way, you’re not operating in the dark.

Instead, you can feel confident knowing that as soon as it’s time to pump more traffic, you’re not risking time or wasting any money.

Stage #4

ENHANCING

Then in the fourth stage, the enhancing stage…

You’ll learn how to boost the conversions at every step of your new E5 Campaign™.

You’ll learn…

How to multiply the value of every new customer using something called an add-on offer sequence.

You’ll learn how to grow your sales conversions by extending the conversion window with each prospect using what’s called an offer sequence.

And you’ll learn how to increase the engagement of every new prospect using something called a B.T.F sequence.

Stage #5

EXPANDING

And in the fifth stage, the expanding stage. You’ll learn how to scale your campaign, traffic, lead flow, and new customer acquisition, even more using a simple four-step system called B.A.C.O™.

You’ll learn how and when to start leveraging new traffic sources and audiences to grow your flow…

…of new customer sales, even more using the simple numbers from the evaluation stage.

And you’ll even learn how to tap into what’s already working for your competitors to grow your own business even faster.

By uncovering where your competitors are, getting all their traffic, all their leads, and all their sales from now.

Once you complete these masterclass modules, you can…

Bonus #1

(a $5,000.00 value)

The first bonus number one is the complete campaign swipe file and dissection bundle.

Now this package is easily worth $5,000.00 itself because inside…

You’re getting access to six of my personal real-world marketing campaigns.

You get all the pages, all the images, all the offers, and all the copy.

This way, you have the exact page templates and layouts that I use in my own million dollars plus E5 Campaigns™ that you can model and swipe for your own campaigns.

This way, you don’t have to worry about how to layout or format any of your campaign pages.

You can just swipe mine.

And there’s more because you also get access to all behind-the-scenes view and dissection of four more of my E5 Campaigns™ that have produced multiple millions of dollars.

Now you’ll see everything.

You’ll see what I said when I said it, why I said it in each of these campaigns, including how I developed the unique mechanisms and big ideas, all the psychological triggers I used, and why.

How I strung together the claims, the promises, and proof.

How and why I structured the offers the way, I did.

Why I use the bonuses I selected, the follow-up sequences, and emails.

The ads I ran, even the videos and graphics used. Including your own unedited copies of the video transcripts and video slide decks that you can model for your own campaign.
